improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited AI support from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: These tags improve search engine visibility by clearly communicating the product value proposition within character limits. The meta description highlights the Claude foundation, free trial offer, and accessible pricing to drive clicks. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional previews when shared on social platforms, increasing click-through rates from LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook where business professionals discover tools.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business decisions. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately names the product and clarifies its purpose (AI assistant for trade and business), building trust and clarity. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) while emphasizing the risk-free trial with 'no card required' to reduce friction and drive conversions.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a GDN AI member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace for all your trade and business needs.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the low entry price and value received, it reduces uncertainty, builds trust, and encourages conversion at the critical paywall moment.
